scope: sequence-only endpoint reclaim; no endpoint run is authorized by this file

role_separated.partial_prior_role_zone_state: CLOSED with its real write pointer; no synthetic padding slots

random_packing.algorithm: sort canonical pages by (SHA256('z0b-random-packing-v1\0' || decimal_seed || '\0' || canonical_page_key), canonical_sort_key)
random_packing.permutation_hash: SHA256 of newline-separated page keys in packed order

offline_hot_cold_oracle.future_information: complete sequence write-touch count for each initial logical page

free_pool_and_gc.new_append_zone_rule: when there is no writable append head and at least two EMPTY zones, open the lowest-id EMPTY zone for new appends
free_pool_and_gc.gc_trigger: when there is no writable append head and exactly one EMPTY zone remains, use that zone as the relocation destination before accepting the next page append
free_pool_and_gc.post_reset: the reset victim returns to the EMPTY free pool
free_pool_and_gc.victim_eligibility: FULL zones only; exclude current append head and relocation destination

cycle.complete: victim selected, every live page relocated, victim reset, and reset victim returned to EMPTY free pool
cycle.cycle_accounting_window: new page appends after the preceding reset and strictly before the GC that completes this cycle; the append that triggers GC belongs to the next tail/cycle because relocation and reset occur before that append
cycle.tail: events after the last completed reset are reported separately and excluded from cycle trend statistics

trend.estimator: exact Theil-Sen median of all pairwise slopes on integer cycle index

bootstrap.kind: circular moving-block residual bootstrap around the fitted Theil-Sen line
bootstrap.derived_seed: first 64 bits of SHA256(master_seed || config_id || trace_id || metric)
bootstrap.trend_label: NO-DETECTED-SEQUENCE-TREND iff the closed interval contains 0; otherwise NONSTATIONARY

relocated_page_distribution_distance.primary: one-dimensional empirical Wasserstein-1 in pages using exact quantile integration
relocated_page_distribution_distance.normalized: W1 divided by pooled arithmetic mean when positive; 0 when both distributions are all-zero; NA when either distribution has no complete cycles

cross_realization.placement_direction: exact sign of total HostWA(Canonical)-HostWA(RoleSeparated) at fixed geometry and cleaner

materialization.event: one reconstructed full 4096-byte page version per touched logical page
